about.title: About
about.subtitle: footballevents.eu — the premium catalog of football events worldwide.
about.body1: footballevents.eu is the premium catalog of football events worldwide — tournaments, training camps, festivals and match tours. We connect organizers with players, parents and fans across borders so that great events find their audience and great players find the right experience.
about.body2: The site is operated by Goality Sport Group OÜ, a sports company based in Tallinn, Estonia. We're builders ourselves — we run football camps and grew tired of fragmented Facebook posts and outdated tables. So we built the catalog we wished existed.
about.body3: Free for participants, free to start for organizers. Paid plans unlock visibility (boosts, featured placements) and lead-management tools. Questions? Press? Partnerships? Write us at support@footballevents.eu — we read every email.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Questions, partnerships, press. We answer within 1 business day.

meta.tagline: The premium catalog of football events worldwide

auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in to apply, follow organizers and save events.
auth.signUpSubtitle: Free forever for participants. Takes 30 seconds.
auth.name: Name
auth.magicLinkSentBody: We sent a one-time sign-in link to your email. Open it to finish signing in.
auth.magicLinkExpiry: The link expires in 30 minutes and can only be used once.

organizer.onboardSubtitle: Once your profile is live, you can publish events, accept applications, and chat with participants.
organizer.name: Public name
organizer.nameHint: How it will appear on your events and profile.
organizer.slugHint: Letters, numbers and hyphens. Auto-filled from name.
organizer.taglineHint: One short sentence — appears under your name.
organizer.aboutHint: What you do, where, for whom. 2–4 sentences works best.
organizer.englishSectionHint: English is required — it's the platform default and what international participants see by default.
organizer.secondSectionHint: Optional. Pick a second language — visitors with that locale will see this version instead of English.
organizer.tierPro: Pro — unlock platform applications, gallery, programme
organizer.tierPremium: Premium — featured placement, YouTube/Vimeo video embed in hero, full toolkit

organizer.alreadyOrganizer: You already have an organizer profile.

venuesPage.title: Locations
venuesPage.subtitle: Places where your events happen. Add new ones — they'll appear in the public catalog.
venuesPage.emptyBody: When you create an event with a venue it'll show up here automatically. Or add a location manually.
venuesPage.newSubtitle: Fill the basics. Once saved, it joins the public catalog.

organizer.duplicateHint: Clone this event as a new draft (dates shifted +1 year)
organizer.noEventsYet: No events yet — create your first to get started.

organizer.settingsComingSoon: Coming next — profile editing, logo/cover, social media, plan and billing (Stripe).
organizer.settingsSaveError: Could not save — please try again

organizer.reviewsModComingSoon: Coming next — review moderation: approve/hide/reply, escalate to admin.
organizer.boostThisHint: One-time visibility upgrade. Pays for itself if it brings even one applicant.

boostBanner.appliedTitle: We auto-applied a free Boost to your nearest event

boostBanner.quotaBody: Your plan includes free Basic boosts. Apply one to your nearest event in one click.

includedBoosts.title: Included with your plan — {remaining} of {total} left this month
includedBoosts.exhausted: You've used this month's free boosts. Quota resets on the 1st.

sharingKit.apiHint: Need it in n8n / Zapier? Just GET /api/events/{slug}/social-image?format=story — returns a PNG.

analytics.subtitle: How your events are performing — views, applications, conversion.
analytics.conversionHint: Conversion = accepted applications ÷ views. A healthy event sits above 5%.

pushNotifications.title: Push Notifications

reviewsModeration.title: Reviews on your events
reviewsModeration.subtitle: Approve, hide, reply or escalate. Reviews you don't act on auto-publish in 72 hours.
reviewsModeration.noPending: Nothing waiting for moderation. Nice work.
reviewsModeration.rejectReasonLabel: Reason for hiding (the reviewer will see this)
reviewsModeration.rejectReasonPlaceholder: e.g. inappropriate language, off-topic, factually wrong…
reviewsModeration.flagReasonPlaceholder: e.g. fake review, didn't attend, harassment…
reviewsModeration.replyPlaceholder: Thank participants, address feedback, share next steps…

reviews.submitSubtitle: Help future participants make the right choice. Be specific and fair — what worked, what didn't.
reviews.bodyPlaceholder: What was the level? Coaching, organization, value? Would you recommend it?
reviews.guidelines: By publishing, you confirm you actually attended this event. The organizer reviews your post within 72 hours, after which it auto-publishes.
reviews.successBody: It's pending the organizer's check. You'll get an email when it's live (auto-publishes within 72 hours).
reviews.ineligibleNotAttended: Reviews are open to participants who attended this event.
reviews.ineligibleEventFuture: This event hasn't ended yet — come back after it's over.

errors.ratingRequired: Pick a rating from 1 to 5 stars
errors.bodyTooShort: Review must be at least 50 characters

flash.planChanged: ✓ Plan updated. Stripe credits or charges the difference automatically — no double billing.

eventForm.newSubtitle: Fill in the basics now — you can add programme, FAQ and gallery after saving as draft.
eventForm.draftHint: Drafts are private. They become public after our team reviews them.

sections.basicsHint: What the event is and who it's for. English is required — other languages are optional.
sections.scheduleHint: Start and end dates. Add registration deadline if applications close earlier.
sections.locationHint: Country, city and optionally a known venue. You can also add a free-text address.
sections.audienceHint: Age groups, gender, skill level and format help participants filter and find your event.
sections.pricingHint: Set a price range or mark the event free. Currency defaults to EUR.
sections.mediaHint: Cover and logo show on every catalog and the event page hero.
sections.videoHint: Paste a YouTube or Vimeo URL. We never host video files ourselves.
sections.contentHint: What's included, programme and FAQ — these convert. One item per line.
sections.bookingHint: Where applications go and how participants can reach you.

eventForm.categoryHint: Pick the closest match — drives sorting and filters.
eventForm.englishSectionHint: Required. English is the catalog's lingua franca — every visitor will see it.
eventForm.secondSectionHint: Add your local language so visitors browsing in it see your native copy instead of English.
eventForm.titleEnHint: Required. Keep it short and specific (e.g. 'Iberia Cup U14 Boys 2026').
eventForm.descriptionEnHint: What participants can expect: format, level, included, why it's special.
eventForm.venueNameHint: Name of the venue — stadium, indoor arena, academy. If it isn't in the catalog yet we'll add it automatically.
eventForm.venueAddressHint: Full physical address — street, number, postcode. Helps players and referees find the place.
eventForm.customLocationHint: Free-form address if no stadium is selected.
eventForm.formatHint: Pick a side count, or leave as Any.
eventForm.externalUrlHint: If you collect signups on your own site (Free tier always uses this).
eventForm.videoUrlHint: Allowed: youtube.com, youtu.be, vimeo.com. Other hosts not accepted.
eventForm.galleryHint: Up to 10 photos, edit after the draft is saved.
eventForm.includedHint: One item per line. E.g. 'Accommodation' / 'Daily meals' / 'Official kit'.
eventForm.notIncludedHint: One item per line. E.g. 'Flights' / 'Travel insurance'.
eventForm.programmeHint: Day-by-day schedule. Title each day and list its items.
eventForm.tierLockBody: Upgrade to fill in this section. Drafts are not blocked — you can save and revisit.
eventForm.videoLockBody: Video embeds are a Premium feature.

errors.datesInvalid: End date must be the same as or after start date
errors.videoNotAllowed: Only YouTube and Vimeo URLs are accepted
errors.priceRange: 'Price up to' must be greater than 'Price from'
errors.eventLimitReached: You've hit your plan's limit — your {tier} plan allows {limit} active events. {hint} See pricing.
errors.limitHintFree: Upgrade to Pro (10 events) or Premium (25).
errors.limitHintPremium: Contact us for an Enterprise plan (25+).
errors.limitHintEnterprise: Contact us to raise your custom limit.

eventForm.publishedHint: Your event is live. Changes are published immediately.

venueForm.name: Name
venueForm.isStadiumHint: Tick if it's a full stadium (not an indoor pitch, training ground or academy field).

stepHints.1: Category, title and description. English required, a second language is optional.
stepHints.2: Dates and location. If the venue isn't in our catalog yet it'll appear automatically after you save.
stepHints.3: Age, gender, level and format — helps players find exactly your event.
stepHints.4: Pricing, contacts and where signups go. Free is OK.
stepHints.5: Logo, cover, programme, what's included and FAQ. When ready — submit for publication.

advertise.pageTitle: Post your football event — let players find it
advertise.pageSubtitle: Tournaments, camps, festivals, masterclasses and match tours. Free to start. Thousands of players, parents and coaches search the catalog every month for events just like yours.

launchPromo.label: Launch offer
launchPromo.title: First 50 organizers — 3 months of Premium free
launchPromo.subtitle: Sign up now and get the Premium plan for 3 months: unlimited events, «Verified» badge, advanced analytics, dedicated manager.

vision.title: Right now, half your potential players never find you
vision.p1: Tournaments and camps live on Instagram stories, outdated websites or in WhatsApp groups. If a person doesn't follow your account or know who to ask — they walk past. Money on ads goes out, applications stay low.
vision.p2: FootballEvents brings all football events into one catalog. A dad in Berlin looking for a summer camp for his son comes to us, picks «10 years old, July, Austria» and sees your program in the top five. No ads needed — just because you're listed.

advertise.channelsTitle: What you can do on the site
advertise.channelsSubtitle: Four options — from free to full premium. Pay only for what you need.

channel1.title: Free for 30 days
channel1.desc: Up to 3 events free for one month. Post them, see how applications come in, then decide — continue on Pro or stay with the basics.
bullets: Applications and messages — in your dashboard

channel2.title: Push your event up
channel2.desc: Need more applications by a specific date? A boost lifts your event in listings for 1–4 weeks. One-off, no subscription.
bullets: Featured — 14 days at category top, green badge, €39
Premium — 7 days on homepage, gold badge, €119
Pay when you need it — no auto-charges

channel3.title: Subscription for active organizers
channel3.desc: Several events per year, or you're an agency? Pro and Premium remove the limits and give you proper tools.
bullets: Pro €9.90/mo (launch) — up to 25 events, analytics, support
Discount on boosts and banner ads

channel4.title: Advertising on the site
channel4.desc: Show a banner only to people who care. For example: parents of U12 kids in Germany, or coaches in Spain.
bullets: Target by country, language, event category

advertise.advantagesTitle: Why this works better than ads

advantage1.title: Players find you in 3 clicks
advantage1.desc: Pick country, age, format — see matching events. No need to scroll 50 sites and Instagram flyers.

advantage2.title: Multilingual site
advantage2.desc: Interface in 4 languages: English, Russian, German and Spanish. Write the description in your language + English (so foreigners understand). Dates, prices, photos — clear without translation.

advantage3.title: Works on mobile
advantage3.desc: 80% of applications come from phones. Site is fast, buttons are big, the form takes 30 seconds.

advantage4.title: No spam reviews
advantage4.desc: You approve reviews yourself. Admin helps in disputes. Trolls simply don't get through.

advantage5.title: Chat inside the site
advantage5.desc: All applicant questions in one place. No leads lost in email, WhatsApp or DMs. Full conversation visible from your dashboard.

advantage6.title: Tickets — coming soon
advantage6.desc: We're adding ticket sales through the site. Money lands directly in your account via Stripe. Turn it on when you want — your data stays.

advertise.showcaseTitle: How your event looks in the catalog
advertise.showcaseSubtitle: Standard, Featured and Premium — see the difference at a glance and in clicks.

showcaseRegular.title: Standard card
showcaseRegular.desc: Shows in category, filters and search. Enough if you already have a name.

showcaseFeatured.title: Green badge + top of category
showcaseFeatured.desc: Card at the top with «Featured» badge. On average 3× more click-throughs.

showcasePremium.title: Gold badge + homepage carousel
showcasePremium.desc: The most visible spot — homepage carousel. 7× more clicks. For your flagship event.

advertise.placementsSubtitle: 12 placements across the site — from the homepage to specific event pages. Different formats for different goals.

placement1.title: Hero — top of homepage
placement1.desc: Most visible spot. Seen by everyone who visits the site.

placement2.title: Mid-page slot
placement2.desc: Between Featured and Top 50 blocks. Big reach without hero priority.

placement3.title: Above category list
placement3.desc: For example, above all «Tournaments» or «Camps». Tight context.

placement4.title: In category feed
placement4.desc: Large native block every 12th position. Doesn't get lost in the flow.

placement5.title: Inside search results
placement5.desc: Every 8th position — native banner. Looks like a card, marked as ad.

placement6.title: Event page — top
placement6.desc: Right under the cover, before the description. 100% of page visitors see it.

placement7.title: Event page — sidebar
placement7.desc: Sidebar next to description and «Apply now». Long-term presence.

placement9.title: Stadium page
placement9.desc: Want only the Spanish audience? Place on Spanish stadium pages.

placement10.title: Organizer page
placement10.desc: Above the organizer's event list. Great for adjacent b2b services.

placement11.title: Mobile sticky bottom
placement11.desc: Pinned to the bottom of the mobile screen. Always visible while scrolling.

placement12.title: Site footer
placement12.desc: On every page bottom. Long-term presence for less money.

step1.title: Sign up
step1.desc: Email + password, 60 seconds. No card needed.

step2.title: Post your event
step2.desc: Name, description, dates, photos, price. English required (so everyone sees it), native language optional.

step3.title: Receive applications
step3.desc: Applications come in. Chat with the participant, accept or decline — all in one place.

advertise.finalCtaTitle: Ready to give it a try?
advertise.finalCtaSubtitle: Free for 30 days. First 50 organizers get 3 months of Premium. No card, no commitment.

pricing.pageSubtitle: Free forever to start. Upgrade when you grow. Boost any event for extra visibility.

flash.checkoutSuccess: ✓ Subscription activated. It may take a moment to reflect on your dashboard.
flash.checkoutCancelled: Checkout cancelled. You can try again anytime.
flash.bundleSuccess: ✓ Bundle purchased — boost credits added to your account.
flash.stripeNotConfigured: Payments are temporarily unavailable. Please try again in a moment.
flash.stripeMissingPrice: That plan isn't available right now. Please contact support.
flash.currentPlan: You're on the {tier} plan. Switching tiers prorates the difference automatically — no double billing.

pricing.boostSubtitle: One-time visibility upgrades. No subscription required.

boostPremium.name: Premium boost
boostPremium.desc: 7 days on homepage hero rotation + featured + gold border.

boostBundle1.name: Bundle 3 + 1
boostBundle1.desc: 3 Featured + 1 Premium boost. Save 23% vs buying separately.

boostBundle2.name: Bundle 5 + 2
boostBundle2.desc: 5 Featured + 2 Premium boosts. Best value — save 44%.

pricing.adsSubtitle: Reach engaged football audiences. Negotiable rates — drop us a line.
pricing.ticketingSubtitle: When we ship platform ticketing, organizers pay a service fee per ticket. Stripe processing passed through separately.

faqs.a: Yes — Free is forever, no credit card. You get 5 active events, gallery, programme, logo in hero. You can upgrade or downgrade any time.

faqs.q: What's the difference between a Boost and Premium?
faqs.a: Boost is a one-time push for a single event. Premium is a recurring subscription that unlocks features (FAQ, video, featured placement) across all your events plus monthly boosts included.
Yes. Annual plans are non-refundable mid-cycle but your features stay active until the end of the period.
We invoice in EUR. EU businesses with a valid VAT number get reverse-charge. Consumers and EU businesses without VAT see VAT added at checkout.

faqs.q: How does the moderation SLA work?
faqs.a: When you submit an event for review, our team approves or returns it within the SLA window for your tier (Free 48h, Pro 24h, Premium 4h).

faqs.q: Can I switch from monthly to annual later?
faqs.a: Yes — switch anytime, the annual price kicks in next billing cycle, with the ~17% savings.

users.confirmBan: Ban {email}? They will be unable to sign in.

footer.tagline: The premium catalog of football events worldwide

aboutPage.metaTitle: About | footballevents.eu — Premium Football Events Catalog
aboutPage.metaDesc: footballevents.eu — international catalog of football events: tournaments, camps, training camps, festivals, match tours and academy trials worldwide. For organizers, clubs and players.
aboutPage.title: The world plays here
aboutPage.subtitle: footballevents.eu is the international catalog of football events. We help organizers find participants, and players find the right events.
aboutPage.missionBody1: We are organizers ourselves. We run football camps and know how hard it is to find participants without expensive advertising. Event information scatters across Facebook groups, outdated websites and fragmented chats. Great events remain invisible — simply because there is nowhere to be seen.
aboutPage.missionBody2: footballevents.eu is the catalog we always needed ourselves. A premium showcase for organizers and a convenient search for players, clubs and parents. One platform — all formats of football events.
aboutPage.formatsSubtitle: Find the right format or list your event in the relevant category

0.label: Tournaments
0.desc: Amateur, youth and professional competitions from all continents

1.label: Camps
1.desc: Football camps with top coaches for children, teenagers and adults

2.label: Festivals
2.desc: Multi-day football celebrations with tournaments, masterclasses and football culture

3.label: Match tours
3.desc: Organised trips to matches of top leagues: Premier League, La Liga, Champions League

4.label: Training camps
4.desc: Training camps for teams and clubs. Pre-season and tactical preparation

5.label: Academy trials
5.desc: Trials at football academies — a chance to enter the professional system

0.title: Organizers
0.desc: Post your event, accept applications online, promote through Featured and boosts — and attract participants from around the world.

1.title: Clubs
1.desc: Register teams for tournaments, organise camps at the best venues in Europe, promote your own club events.

2.title: Players & parents
2.desc: Find tournaments, camps and academy trials. Filter by age, level and country. Apply in one click.

0.title: 50+ countries
0.desc: Events from all continents in one catalog

1.title: Online applications
1.desc: No calls or messengers — form, confirmation, tracking

2.title: Verified organizers
2.desc: Every organizer goes through platform moderation

3.title: Free for participants
3.desc: Registration and event search are always free

aboutPage.companyBody1: The platform is developed by Goality Sport Group OÜ — a sports company from Tallinn, Estonia. We organise our own football camps and fully understand the challenges organizers face: scattered announcements, chaotic application collection, zero analytics.
aboutPage.companyBody2: Free for participants. For organizers — a free start and paid promotion tools (Featured placements, boosts, homepage carousel). Questions, press, partnerships — write to
aboutPage.ctaSubtitle: Find an event or list yours — it's free

aboutTournaments.metaDesc: Catalog of football tournaments for amateurs, youth, corporate teams and semi-professionals. Competitions from all continents — filter by age, level and country, apply online.
aboutTournaments.title: Football Tournaments from around the World
aboutTournaments.subtitle: From street cups to international championships — find a competition at your level in any country and apply online.
aboutTournaments.whyTitle: Why a tournament is the best way to grow
aboutTournaments.whyBody1: A tournament is a concentrated dose of experience. In one weekend a player gains more game situations, pressure and feedback than in a month of training. That is why the best academies in the world build their development programmes around competitive practice.
aboutTournaments.whyBody2: footballevents.eu gathers tournaments from more than 50 countries — from local city cups to major international tournaments with teams from 20+ nations. Filter by age, level, format and country — find exactly what you or your team needs.
aboutTournaments.typesTitle: What tournaments you'll find in the catalog

0.title: Youth tournaments
0.desc: Competitions from U7 to U21. Development formats, international championships, academic selections. For children and teenagers.

1.title: Amateur cups
1.desc: Weekend leagues, city cups, corporate championships. Play without a professional contract — for the love of the game.

2.title: International tournaments
2.desc: Invited teams from different countries. A true international experience — new opponents, new connections, a new level.

3.title: Semi-professional
3.desc: Competitions for players with serious ambitions. High level of play, professional referees, match analysis.

0.title: Find a tournament
0.desc: Use filters by country, age group, level and dates

1.title: Check the details
1.desc: Schedule, rules, fees, venue — everything is on the event page

2.title: Apply
2.desc: Online form in 2 minutes. No calls, messengers or waiting

3.title: Get confirmation
3.desc: The organizer will review your application and contact you on the platform

aboutTournaments.forOrgHeadline: List a tournament — get applications from 50+ countries
aboutTournaments.forOrgBody: footballevents.eu is the best way to give your tournament international visibility without costly advertising. Organizers on the Premium plan regularly receive applications from countries they had never reached on their own.

orgBenefits.0: Audience from 50+ countries — without expensive ads
orgBenefits.1: Online applications and participant management in the dashboard
orgBenefits.2: Featured placement and boosts for maximum visibility

aboutCamps.metaDesc: Football camps for children and adults: summer camps, intensive training, international programmes. Professional coaches, modern pitches, unforgettable experience.
aboutCamps.title: Football Camps
aboutCamps.subtitle: One week at the right camp can change your game forever. Find an intensive with world-class coaches — nearby or abroad.
aboutCamps.openingTitle: A camp is more than just training
aboutCamps.openingBody1: A football camp is a unique environment where a child or adult player is fully immersed in sport. Every day brings several training sessions, game analysis, work with a coach and interaction with players from other teams, cities and countries. No weekly class or local section can offer this.
aboutCamps.openingBody2: On footballevents.eu you will find camps from verified organizers worldwide: summer camps in Spain and Portugal, academy intensives, week-long programmes at the best pitches in Europe — and local camps in your own city for those who want to start close to home.

0.title: Summer camps
0.desc: The classic format: one or two weeks at a great venue. Training, games, friendships. For children aged 6 to 17.

1.title: Intensive camps
1.desc: 3–5 days of concentrated work on technique, tactics or physical conditioning. For seriously motivated players.

2.title: International programmes
2.desc: Camps in Spain, Portugal, Germany, England. Training at top-club academies. Living in a professional environment.

3.title: Academy camps
3.desc: Programmes at football academies with professional coaches and a chance to enter the club system.

4.title: Team camps
4.desc: A camp for the whole team — combining training, team-building and matches against other groups.

5.title: Family camps
5.desc: Formats involving parents: observation, lectures, training together. Sport as a family adventure.

aboutCamps.whyTitle: What a football camp gives you
aboutCamps.whyBody: Players who regularly attend camps develop ahead of their peers — confirmed by academy coaches across Europe. The reason is simple: the intensity and concentration of experience that is unattainable in a normal training routine.

whyBenefits.2: New friends from different countries — for life
whyBenefits.4: Experience of life in a professional sporting environment
whyBenefits.5: Independence and responsibility away from home

aboutCamps.testimonialQuote: One good summer camp in Spain gave my son more than three years in the local section. The coaches, the pitches, the opponents — a completely different level.
aboutCamps.testimonialAuthor: Parent of a U14 player, Moscow
aboutCamps.forOrgHeadline: Fill your camp with participants from around the world
aboutCamps.forOrgBody: List your camp on footballevents.eu and receive applications from parents and players from 50+ countries. Manage applications in a convenient dashboard, promote through Featured and showcase your programme, coaches and photos on a professional page.
aboutCamps.ctaSubtitle: Camps for children, teenagers and adults — from around the world

aboutMatchTours.metaDesc: Organised tours to Champions League, La Liga, Premier League, Serie A and other top-league matches. Tickets, hotel, transfer — a live stadium is unforgettable. Choose a tour and book online.
aboutMatchTours.title: Football Match Tours
aboutMatchTours.subtitle: A live stadium is unforgettable. Organised tours to Champions League, Premier League, La Liga and other top leagues — with tickets, hotel and transfers.
aboutMatchTours.whyTitle: A live match — a different world
aboutMatchTours.whyBody1: Watching football on TV and being at the stadium are two completely different experiences. The roar of the stands, the smell of the grass, the physical presence of thousands of fans experiencing the same thing — no HD broadcast can convey that.
aboutMatchTours.whyBody2: Match tours take away all the hard parts: finding official tickets (which are not freely available), booking a hotel, navigating an unfamiliar city, the language barrier. You simply arrive — and take home unforgettable emotions.
aboutMatchTours.leaguesNote: Organizers also offer tours to domestic league and cup matches — check the catalog for details.

0.title: Match tickets
0.desc: The tour organizer handles finding and booking official tickets

1.title: Accommodation
1.desc: A hotel near the stadium or city centre — chosen together with the tour

2.title: Transfers
2.desc: Airport pickup and transfer to the stadium — no stress or navigation in an unfamiliar city

3.title: Excursions
3.desc: Stadium tour, club museum, training ground visit — depending on the tour

4.title: Guide & coordination
4.desc: A professional local guide, ready to answer questions and resolve issues

5.title: Group of like-minded fans
5.desc: You won't travel alone — fellow fans who already share a common passion

aboutMatchTours.includedNote: * The exact tour package depends on the organizer and chosen programme. Check the event page for details.
aboutMatchTours.forWhomTitle: Who is a match tour right for

0.title: For fans
0.desc: Always dreamed of seeing Real Madrid or Manchester United live? A tour takes care of all the complexity — visas, tickets, hotel — leaving only the emotions.

1.title: For families
1.desc: Family tours with a thoughtful programme: match, stadium tour, club museum, city walk. Unforgettable memories for children.

2.title: For corporates
2.desc: VIP tours to top-club matches — the best corporate event for your team or partners. Business networking + football = works perfectly.

aboutMatchTours.testimonialQuote: First time at Camp Nou — it was incredible. The tour organisers handled everything: tickets in the right section, a hotel 10 minutes' walk away, a stadium tour the day before the match. Already planning the next trip.
aboutMatchTours.ctaSubtitle: Premier League, La Liga, Champions League — in the catalog right now

aboutFestivals.metaDesc: Multi-day football festivals: street football, beach soccer, family events, football culture. Find festivals worldwide — from urban celebrations to international showcase events.
aboutFestivals.title: Football Festivals
aboutFestivals.subtitle: Football is a celebration. Festivals combine tournaments, masterclasses, culture and an atmosphere impossible to create in a regular match.
aboutFestivals.openingBody1: A football festival is when sport meets culture. Two or three days at a large venue, several concurrent tournaments, masterclasses, music, food — and a unifying atmosphere created by thousands of people who genuinely love the game.
aboutFestivals.openingBody2: In the footballevents.eu catalog you will find festivals of every format — from urban street-football celebrations to multi-day international events with teams from dozens of countries. All on one platform, with online registration.

0.title: Street football
0.desc: Street ball, free-kick competitions, freestyle. Asphalt, small goals, big emotions. For those who grew up kicking a ball in the yard.

1.title: Beach soccer
1.desc: Sand, sea, summer tournament. Beach soccer brings together professionals and amateurs — the same rules for everyone.

2.title: Family festivals
2.desc: Formats for the whole family: kids play, parents cheer, everyone eats and has fun together. A celebration, not just a tournament.

3.title: Football + culture
3.desc: Events where football is part of a larger cultural programme. Music, food, art, exhibitions. Atmosphere, not just the score.

4.title: Multi-format events
4.desc: Several tournaments, age categories and formats in one venue. Three days — thousands of participants and spectators.

5.title: Media festivals
5.desc: Competitions with full media production: broadcasts, photographers, YouTube. Your goals will make the highlights.

aboutFestivals.whyTitle: Why you should go to a festival
aboutFestivals.whyBody: A festival is an event that bonds a team, creates a shared story and stays in the memory for years. It is not just a competition — it is an experience.

whyBenefits.0: An atmosphere you won't find at an ordinary tournament
whyBenefits.1: Plenty of activities beyond the game
whyBenefits.3: Content for social media — photos, videos, memories
whyBenefits.4: For the whole team — not just the players

aboutFestivals.testimonialQuote: We arrived as a team — we left as a family. The festival didn't just give us playing time, it created memories we still talk about.
aboutFestivals.testimonialAuthor: Captain of an amateur team, Berlin
aboutFestivals.ctaSubtitle: Street football, beach soccer, family formats — all in the catalog

aboutTrainingCamps.metaTitle: Training Camps for Football Teams | footballevents.eu
aboutTrainingCamps.metaDesc: Organisation of training camps for football teams and clubs. Pre-season preparation, tactical camps, international training bases in Spain, Turkey, UAE and across Europe.
aboutTrainingCamps.title: Training Camps for Teams
aboutTrainingCamps.subtitle: Pre-season preparation, tactical and physical camps, international bases — find the right programme and venue for your team anywhere in the world.
aboutTrainingCamps.whyBody1: Teams that hold training camps enter the season with an advantage. Not just physical — tactical and psychological. Time together away from the usual environment, shared video analysis, the trust built on the pitch — these cannot be bought, but they can be created at the right camp.
aboutTrainingCamps.whyBody2: footballevents.eu brings together camp organizers from the best training bases in Europe and beyond. Filter by country, dates, capacity, facility level — and find the programme that suits your team.

0.title: Pre-season camps
0.desc: The foundation of a successful season. 7–14 days of intensive training, friendly matches, building team chemistry.

1.title: Tactical camps
1.desc: Working on a specific formation, set pieces, pressing or positional attack — a deep training focus.

2.title: Physical camps
2.desc: Targeted work on physical fitness: endurance, speed, strength training. With professional fitness coaches.

3.title: Team-building camps
3.desc: Team psychology, trust, communication. A blend of training, team activities and conflict-resolution sessions.

4.title: Video-analysis camps
4.desc: Bases equipped with video recording systems. Every training session and match analysed with coaches. Accelerated progress through data.

5.title: Youth camps
5.desc: Specialist development programmes for club academies. Working with U8–U21 groups using methods from leading European schools.

aboutTrainingCamps.destinationsNote: These are just some of the destinations — new bases appear in the catalog regularly.
aboutTrainingCamps.forOrgHeadline: Fill your base with teams from around the world
aboutTrainingCamps.forOrgBody: Organisers of training bases and camps use footballevents.eu as a channel to attract international teams. Without language barriers or complex sales logistics — a platform page speaks for itself.

orgBenefits.0: Publish your camp programme with a full description of facilities and services
orgBenefits.1: Accept applications from teams in any country online
orgBenefits.2: Visibility in the catalog without advertising spend
orgBenefits.3: Featured page with photos of pitches, catering and accommodation
orgBenefits.4: Team application tools — multiple players in one form

0.label: Flexible dates
0.val: Multiple programmes across different parts of the season

1.label: Team applications
1.val: One form for the whole team — not individual players

2.label: Map & facilities
2.val: Show pitches, halls, catering and accommodation

3.label: Analytics
3.val: Views, applications, conversion — in the organizer dashboard

aboutTrainingCamps.ctaTitle: Find a training camp for your team
aboutTrainingCamps.ctaSubtitle: Training bases and programmes across Europe and beyond

aboutAcademyTrials.metaTitle: Academy Trials at Football Academies | footballevents.eu
aboutAcademyTrials.metaDesc: Open trials at football academies in Europe and beyond. A chance for talented players to enter the professional system. For children, teenagers and adults from U8 to U21+.
aboutAcademyTrials.title: Academy Trials
aboutAcademyTrials.subtitle: Every professional footballer once attended a trial. Find your chance — from regional clubs to top academies in Europe.
aboutAcademyTrials.whyBody1: Professional football begins the moment someone notices you. Scouts travel the world — but talented players often simply don't know where or how to get on the radar. Open trials are an organised opportunity you can find, prepare for and use.
aboutAcademyTrials.whyBody2: footballevents.eu gathers trials from academies and clubs across Europe. There is no 'closed club' here — only open events with a clear format and online application. Every worthy player deserves a chance to be seen.

0.title: International trials
0.desc: Top-club academies in Spain, Portugal, Germany and the Netherlands hold open selections for players from around the world.

1.title: Academy programmes
1.desc: Extended programmes with full immersion in the academy environment. Not just a trial — a complete training period.

2.title: Regional trials
2.desc: Lower-league clubs and regional academies looking for local talent. For those starting out on the professional path.

3.title: Elite selections
3.desc: Closed trials from professional clubs. Require a video application or recommendation. High standard — high expectations.

4.title: Scouting days
4.desc: Organised events to which professional scouts are invited. One day — hundreds of eyes on you.

5.title: Online scouting
5.desc: Platforms with a video application: upload your footage, a scout evaluates remotely. If you impress — an invitation to an in-person trial.

0.label: U8–U10
0.note: First steps: assessing coordination, coachability and love of the game

1.label: U11–U13
1.note: Technical foundation and game understanding — the key criteria

3.label: U17–U19
3.note: Close to youth professional level. Serious selection

4.label: U20–U21
4.note: Last chance to enter the system. High requirements

aboutAcademyTrials.prepareTitle: How to prepare for a trial
aboutAcademyTrials.prepareBody: A good trial is not a matter of luck — it is the result of preparation. Academies and scouts watch dozens of players simultaneously. Physical readiness, the right self-presentation and a professional attitude to the process will help you stand out.

prepareTips.0: Physical fitness: endurance, speed, explosive power — at peak level
prepareTips.1: Video application: 3–5 minutes of your best game moments. The first 30 seconds decide
prepareTips.2: Player CV: age, position, club history, achievements, height/weight
prepareTips.3: Mindset: a trial is an experience. The first one is rarely the last
prepareTips.4: Languages: basic English helps a lot at international trials
prepareTips.5: Recommendations from your coach — often valued more than any video

aboutAcademyTrials.testimonialQuote: I went through three trials before I was accepted. Each one taught me something new. The last one — in Portugal, found through footballevents.eu. I'm training at the academy now and have no regrets.
aboutAcademyTrials.forAcademiesBody: List a trial on footballevents.eu and receive applications from players in 50+ countries. Filtering by age and level will immediately filter out irrelevant candidates.
aboutAcademyTrials.ctaSubtitle: Academies in Europe and beyond are looking for talent right now

aboutOrganizers.metaDesc: Tools for football tournament, camp and festival organizers: online applications, Featured promotion and boosts, analytics. Free to start — paid features available on request.
aboutOrganizers.title: List your event — get participants from around the world
aboutOrganizers.subtitle: footballevents.eu is the international showcase for your tournament, camp or festival. Online applications, promotion, analytics — all in one place.
aboutOrganizers.problemTitle: Tired of Facebook, spreadsheets and messengers?
aboutOrganizers.problemBody1: Most organizers collect applications through Google Forms, manage participants in Excel, announce in Facebook groups where a post lives for two days — and lose potential participants who simply couldn't find the information in time.
aboutOrganizers.problemBody2: footballevents.eu replaces the entire chain. The event page works around the clock, accepts applications automatically, ranks in search engines — and shows your event to an audience that is already looking for exactly what you offer.

0.title: International audience
0.desc: Your event will be seen by participants from 50+ countries. Without targeted advertising or language barriers — the platform is multilingual.

1.title: Online applications
1.desc: Participants apply directly on the site. You see all requests in the dashboard, respond and update statuses. Nothing superfluous.

2.title: Boosts & Featured
2.desc: Want more views? Lift your event to the top position or into the homepage carousel — in one click.

3.title: Analytics
3.desc: Page views, number of applications, traffic sources. Understand what works and improve your events every time.

4.title: Verified profile
4.desc: The Verified badge shows participants that the organizer has passed moderation and is trustworthy. Trust = more applications.

5.title: Gallery & media
5.desc: Add photos, a programme, YouTube videos (Premium plan). Your event page is your showcase, not just a row in a table.

aboutOrganizers.stepsTitle: How to get started in 10 minutes

0.title: Create a profile
0.desc: Name, description, logo. 5 minutes — and you are on the platform.

1.title: Publish an event
1.desc: Date, venue, category, price, description. Draft before publishing.

2.title: Receive applications
2.desc: Email and dashboard notification with every new application.

3.title: Manage participants
3.desc: Confirm, decline, message — directly on the platform.

aboutOrganizers.tiersSubtitle: Free to start. Pay only when you want to grow faster.
aboutOrganizers.testimonialQuote: After listing on footballevents.eu we received applications from 7 countries we had never reached before. The whole process — registration, publishing and the first application — took less than a day.
aboutOrganizers.testimonialAuthor: Organizer of an annual U14 tournament, Warsaw

aboutClubs.metaTitle: footballevents.eu for Football Clubs | Tournaments, Camps, Players
aboutClubs.metaDesc: How a football club can use footballevents.eu: find tournaments for teams, organise training camps, attract players through trials, promote club events.
aboutClubs.title: footballevents.eu for Football Clubs
aboutClubs.subtitle: Register teams for tournaments, organise camps, hold trials and promote club events — all on one platform.
aboutClubs.introBody1: A modern football club juggles many things at once: playing in tournaments, finding new players, holding camps, organising its own events. All of this is usually scattered across different spreadsheets, messengers and websites.
aboutClubs.introBody2: footballevents.eu covers the entire cycle: as a discovery tool (find tournaments and camps) and as a promotion tool (publish your own events and trials for an international audience).

0.label: Professional clubs
0.desc: Academies with a youth team system

1.label: Amateur clubs
1.desc: City and district clubs with several squads

2.label: Football schools
2.desc: Private schools and sections working with children

aboutClubs.useCasesTitle: What a club does on the platform

0.title: Find tournaments for teams
0.desc: Register one or several club teams for tournaments — from city cups to international competitions. Filter by age, level, country.

1.title: Organise camps
1.desc: Find training bases and camp programmes — pre-season, tactical, international. One application form for the whole team.

2.title: Hold trials
2.desc: Publish open trials for your academy or first team. Receive applications from players worldwide — with details, age and position.

3.title: Promote club events
3.desc: Hosting a tournament, camp or open day? List it on the platform — and reach an audience from 50+ countries with no ad budget.

4.title: Attract players
4.desc: Open trials and club events on footballevents.eu are the best way to get noticed by new players, especially international ones.

5.title: Plan the season
5.desc: The events catalog helps you build the team calendar: tournaments, camps, festivals — all in one place with a date filter.

benefits.0: Single platform for all club activities
benefits.2: Online applications for tournaments and camps — paperless
benefits.3: Team applications: one submission for the whole group

aboutClubs.testimonialQuote: We used to find tournaments through contacts or Facebook groups. Now we open the catalog, filter by team age — and within 5 minutes we're already applying. Plus we listed our own summer tournament and got teams from three countries.
aboutClubs.testimonialAuthor: Director of an amateur club, Riga
aboutClubs.ctaSubtitle: First events and organizer profile — free forever

aboutPlayers.parentsBody: Enrolling a child in a camp or tournament is a serious decision. footballevents.eu makes the process as straightforward as possible: verified organizers, full event information, secure payment and direct contact through the platform.

parentsBenefits.0: Transparent information: price, programme, coaches, address
parentsBenefits.1: Verified organizers — the platform has checked every one
parentsBenefits.2: Online payment through a secure payment gateway (Stripe)
parentsBenefits.3: Contact with the organizer directly through the platform
parentsBenefits.4: Reviews from other parents about events
parentsBenefits.5: Notifications about changes to the event

aboutPlayers.testimonialQuote: My son dreamed of going to a camp in Spain. We found it through footballevents.eu — everything was transparent: coaches, programme, photos, reviews from other parents. We applied, got a reply in a day. He went — and came back a completely different player.
